summary: Frontend UX fixes verified: (1) Tooltip now appears on hovering entire FactorCard component (not just info icon), (2) 'Modifier' buttons work correctly - clicking them resets subsequent selections as expected.
critical_code_review_comments: FactorCard.js lines 40-43: onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave correctly moved to wrapper div for full-card hover tooltip
GuidedEntryModal.js lines 154-168: goBackToStep() function correctly resets selections when navigating backwards
GuidedEntryModal.js lines 549-569: Subcategory condensed view correctly shows 'Modifier' button (data-testid='change-subcategory-btn') only when subcategories.length > 1
GuidedEntryModal.js lines 602-623: Unit condensed view correctly shows 'Modifier' button (data-testid='change-unit-btn') only when availableUnits.length > 1
context_for_next_testing_agent: UX fixes for GuidedEntryModal verified. Both fixes work as expected.

fix_1_tooltip_on_card_hover.description: Tooltip appears when hovering over entire FactorCard, not just info icon
fix_1_tooltip_on_card_hover.verification: Hovered over 'Gaz naturel moyen' card, tooltip appeared showing: 'Utilisé pour le chauffage et les voitures. Ex : VW Passat au gaz naturel.'
fix_1_tooltip_on_card_hover.code_change_verified: FactorCard.js lines 40-43: onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave on wrapper div

fix_2_modifier_button_subcategory.description: In creation mode at step 3+, 'Modifier' button appears on condensed subcategory display when multiple subcategories exist
fix_2_modifier_button_subcategory.verification: Tested with 'Biens et services achetés' category (35 subcategories). 'Modifier' button (data-testid='change-subcategory-btn') visible at step 3
fix_2_modifier_button_subcategory.reset_behavior: Clicking 'Modifier' returns to step 1, resets unit and factor selections (verified: 35 subcategory buttons visible, 0 factor cards)

fix_2_modifier_button_unit.description: In creation mode at step 3+, 'Modifier' button appears on condensed unit display when multiple units exist
fix_2_modifier_button_unit.verification: Tested with 'Combustion fixe > Combustibles' (3 units: litres, mégajoules, kilogrammes). 'Modifier' button (data-testid='change-unit-btn') visible at step 3
fix_2_modifier_button_unit.reset_behavior: Clicking 'Modifier' returns to step 2, resets factor selection (verified: 3 unit buttons visible, 0 factor cards)

fix_2_modifier_hidden_when_single_option.description: 'Modifier' buttons correctly hidden when only 1 option available
fix_2_modifier_hidden_when_single_option.verification_subcategory: Combustion fixe has only 1 subcategory ('Combustibles'), no 'Modifier' button shown - correct behavior
fix_2_modifier_hidden_when_single_option.verification_unit: Alimentation has only 1 unit ('milliers de CHF'), no 'Modifier' button shown - correct behavior

end_to_end_modal_flow.description: Complete flow: subcategory -> unit -> factor -> quantity -> submit
end_to_end_modal_flow.verification: Modal works end-to-end, submit button enabled after completing all steps

test_scenarios_executed.name: Scope 1 - Combustion fixe (single subcategory, multiple units)
steps: Open modal for Combustion fixe category
Verify 'Modifier' button visible for unit (3 units available)
Verify 'Modifier' button NOT visible for subcategory (only 1 option)
Click 'Modifier' for unit - returns to step 2, factor reset

test_scenarios_executed.name: Scope 3 Amont - Biens et services achetés (multiple subcategories)
steps: Open modal for 'Biens et services achetés' category
Verify 'Modifier' button visible for subcategory (35 options)
Verify 'Modifier' button NOT visible for unit (only 1 option)
Click 'Modifier' for subcategory - returns to step 1, unit and factor reset
